covers: width-invariant-dedup — the SAME logical marker captured at two pane widths, where the narrow capture's continuation join inserted a space inside a wrapped word (`configure d`), must dedup in BOTH directions: the comparison runs on whitespace-stripped keys, so an attach/detach resize can never re-fire an already-consumed wrapped marker (allow-list #1, BUG-1 class)
